历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were 5819→5756→4763→5003→4901, showing a fluctuating forward trend overall. The ranking significantly improved in 2023 (4763), then slightly declined in 2024–2025, with a baseline of approximately 4901 in 2025. The provincial science enrollment plan was 51 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 53 in 2024, and 55 in 2025 (physics category). In 2026, the physics category plan is 51, a reduction of 4 students compared to 2025, a reduction rate of about 7.3%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 33–36 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 level. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving academic misconduct incidents); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 1st (high heat), with a graduation ceremony umbrella video receiving over 9 million likes, indicating extremely high application attention; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, with materials and metallurgy disciplines at the national top, highly aligned with the university's science and engineering orientation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended, highly matching the university's advantageous engineering majors; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (physics category 173,282 + history category 112,406 = 285,688), sharply intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Yunnan candidates; local enrollment proportion data is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 4901, the 7.3% enrollment reduction in 2026 theoretically moves the ranking upward (easier to enter), but the 32% surge in the total number of candidates in the province intensifies competition, and the high Douyin popularity boosts application heat. Under the combined effect, intensified competition dominates; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4787, with a range of 4287–5287.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4287–5287, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Communication Engineering, Engineering Experimental Class) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Science Experimental Class, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Materials Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4287), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were 1975 → 1563 → 1848 → 1411 → 1819, showing significant fluctuations overall. The best ranking was in 2024 (1411), followed by a notable drop to 1819 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 400 places in the past three years. Provincial liberal arts enrollment plans: 12 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 11 in 2025 (history category). In 2026, the history category plan is 17, an increase of 6 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 54.5%, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 35th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities (2026), belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to academic misconduct incidents). It ranks first in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), indicating extremely high application attention. The university's liberal arts majors (Business Administration, Social Sciences Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature) have corresponding discipline evaluations: Business Administration B+, Law B+, Foreign Languages and Literature B+, none reaching A- level, indicating relatively limited advantages in liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Business Administration has mixed social popularity with a wait-and-see attitude, Law is relatively hot, and Foreign Languages and Literature is generally lukewarm. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is 377,900, a significant increase from 2025, but the proportion of history category examinees needs estimation: in 2025, there were 112,406 history category examinees, accounting for 39.3% of the total. By this ratio, the 2026 history category would be about 148,000, an increase of about 32% from 2025. The provincial control line for the 2025 history category undergraduate batch is 465 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Yunnan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1819, the significant 54.5% expansion in 2026 will cause the ranking number to increase significantly (harder to enter), but the 32% increase in the total number of examinees in the province intensifies competition. Since the expansion rate far exceeds the examinee growth rate, competition overall eases. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2364, with a range of 2009–2719.
